summary: Subcontractor Financial Flow (5 Phases) - All 27 tests passed. Complete backend testing for Subcontractors, Packages, Lines, Acts, Payments, and Profit Integration.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Subcontractor, TEST_Package with lines, confirmed act, and payment for end-to-end flow verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subcontractor Financial Flow fully tested. Project PRJ-001 now has additional subcontractor packages. Package status transitions (draft→confirmed→partially_certified→closed) verified. Payable math (certified_total - paid_total) verified. Profit integration showing subcontract_detail in project-profit endpoint.

P1: POST /api/subcontractors creates sub.notes: Creates subcontractor with auto-generated ID, active=true by default

P1: POST /api/subcontractor-packages cre.notes: Creates draft package with auto-generated package_no (SP-XXXX format)

P1: POST /api/subcontractor-packages/{id.notes: Returns 400 if no lines, confirms with calculated contract_total
Closes confirmed/partially_certified packages, rejects draft packages

P2: POST /api/subcontractor-packages/{id.notes: Populates lines from offer with availability check

P2: Over-allocation returns 400 when ass.notes: Tracks assigned qty per offer_line_id across all packages

P2: DELETE /api/subcontractor-package-li.notes: Only allows deletion from draft packages

P3: POST /api/subcontractor-acts/{id}/co.notes: Updates line certified_qty, package certified_total, payable_total

P4: POST /api/subcontractor-payments cre.notes: Creates payment with auto-generated payment_no (SPAY-XXXX format)

P5: GET /api/project-profit/{id} include.notes: subcontract_detail has all financial metrics when available

P5: metrics_available.subcontract_cost r.notes: Shows true when confirmed packages exist

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints using real backend
